items.title: Why Young Investors Are Betting It All
items.description: Faced with rising expenses, massive student debt and diminishing job prospects, throwing the dice is looking increasingly attractive to some.

items.title: SK Hynix Is Said to Price US Share Offering at $149 Apiece
items.description: SK Hynix Inc. priced its US listing of American depositary receipts at $149 each, according to a person familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified as the information isn’t public.

items.description: Vineer Bhansali, founder of LongTail Alpha, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The Fed has kept its benchmark rate steady this year, but support for rate hikes is growing among officials.

items.title: Kimmeridge Faults Pace of Devon Energy’s Asset-Sale Efforts
items.description: Kimmeridge Energy Management Co., an outspoken shale investor, criticized Devon Energy Corp.’s divestment program as too slow after the driller’s $25 billion takeover of Coterra Energy Inc.

items.title: New Zealand Dollar Surges as Economic Data Fuels Rate Hike Bets
items.description: The New Zealand dollar advanced Thursday to the highest in more than two weeks after strong manufacturing data increased bets on further monetary tightening in the nation.

items.title: France Seen Dodging Recession as Central Bank Lifts GDP Estimate
items.description: The Bank of France raised its short-term growth estimate as activity improved in all sectors in June, indicating the economy will safely avoid a recession.
